reviews.comment:
Con una humilde y muy buena atención, nos trataron de diez cuando nos quedamos una noche en Los Altares por un viaje. El hotel del ACA puede estar vacío practicamente, pero no deja de ser un buen hotel rutero. Las sábanas son las originales que tenían los hoteles de todos los ACA, con lo cual, tienen fácil 40 años.

(Translated by Google)
With humble yet excellent service, we were treated wonderfully when we stayed one night at Los Altares during a trip. The ACA hotel may be practically empty, but it's still a good roadside hotel. The sheets are the original ones that all ACA hotels used, so they're easily 40 years old.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURReHBUaF9nRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
When I passed by, the place was under renovation; there was no gas station; only the hotel was open.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) We arrived unexpectedly during construction (the station was closed) and yet we were very warmly welcomed by the manager's family, the room was very clean and comfortable, we were helped out with dinner, all in a really remote location: a very good memory of our holiday.

(Original)
Nous sommes passés à l'improviste en pleins travaux (la station était fermée) et pourtant nous avons été très bien accueillis par la famille du gérant, la chambre était très propre et confortable, nous avons été dépannés pour le dîner,  le tout dans un endroit vraiment perdu : un très bon souvenir de nos vacances.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3Z3Jxd1dnEAE

reviews.comment:
Impecable. Acá, su dueño se lleva la ovación.
Nos rescató a 200 km y nos trajo al ACA porque nos quedamos en 3 llantas sin poder zafar si no hubiera sido por él. Sorry dueño del ACA, olvidé tu nombre pero no tu nobleza.

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable. Here, the owner deserves all the praise.
He rescued us 200 km away and brought us to the ACA because we were stranded on three tires and couldn't get out if it hadn't been for him. Sorry, ACA owner, I forgot your name but not your kindness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3eE5lLU53EAE
